overview.description: The PGIM S&P 500 Max Buffer ETF - January (PMJA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a pre-determined investment outcome over a one year period. The exposure is reset annually in January PMJA was launched on Dec 27, 2024 and is issued by PGIM.
